speaker: speaker1
text: Good afternoon ! Can I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Could you show me where the Chinesc-style clothing is located ? I want to buy a silk coat .

speaker: speaker1
text: This way , please . Here they are . They're all handmade .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , they look nice . May I try that black one on ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course . The fitting room is right over there .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you have a medium in the same color ? This one is a little tight .

speaker: speaker1
text: l'm sorry . All the black of that size are sold out . Would you like a red one ?

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . Let me try it on . What do you think ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , that suits you very well . Besides it is believed in China that the red color brings happiness and good luck .

speaker: speaker2
text: Really ? I'II take it and I'm leaving here tomorrow . Is it possible for you to send one in black to me by mail when you get it in ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Our pleasure . Please fill out this form , leaving your address and telephone number .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thanks . How much would that come to ?
